all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And he answered, Fear not: for they that be with us are more than they that be with them.
2 Kings 6:16
Quote of the Day
"If we have a sincere desire, being meek and lowly in heart, we can come to know the true God the Father and gain eternal life."
Elder Wan-Liang Wu | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
